/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/ShapesEditor.dir/ShapesEditor_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ShapesEditor.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ShapesEditor.dir/main_window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ShapesEditor.dir/factory/shape_factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ShapesEditor.dir/factory/shape_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ShapesEditor.dir/shapes/shape.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ShapesEditor.dir/shapes/polygon.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ShapesEditor.dir/shapes/ellipse.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ShapesEditor.dir/shapes/composite_shape.cpp.o -o ShapesEditor  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.3
